a.xlink:title: The Async<T> container: coroutine‐safe asynchronous read/write.
Concepts and helpers for composing Async expressions.
Utilities for awaiting on Async<T>: co_await overload, all(), try_await().
Small async helper operations used in tests and examples.
Write-once async wrappers (FutureValue and Defer) built on Async<T>.
Debug metadata nodes used for async DAG visualization.
Awaitable gates for Async<T>: snapshot‐reads and in‐place writes.
Inline implementation of Async<T> helpers and task await transforms.
Assignment-semantic traits for async write buffers and proxies.
Defines BasicAsyncTask, the fire-and-forget coroutine handle.
Defines AsyncTask::promise_type, the fire-and-forget coroutine handle.
Manages one “generation” of write/read ordering in an Async<T>
Reference-counted optional in-place storage used by async buffers.
Selects the task-registry implementation for the current build mode.
